name: Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, manual data entry causes late audits. We provide automated invoice aggregation instead of manual data entry into spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Difficulty in compiling invoice data for monthly audits
